sections.heading: Why Sleep is a Productivity Tool
sections.body: Sleep isn't wasted time — it's when your brain consolidates learning, repairs cells, and clears metabolic waste. After one night of poor sleep (less than 6 hours), cognitive performance drops by 30%. After a week of 6-hour nights, you're as impaired as someone who's been awake for 24 hours straight. Developers who prioritize sleep write better code, make fewer bugs, and learn new concepts faster.

sections.heading: Sleep Hygiene for Developers
sections.body: Sleep hygiene means creating conditions that promote consistent, restful sleep:

code.snippet:
DEVELOPER SLEEP HYGIENE CHECKLIST:

ENVIRONMENT:
□ Room temperature: 65-68°F (18-20°C)
□ Room: completely dark (blackout curtains or eye mask)
□ Room: quiet (earplugs or white noise machine)
□ Bed: used for sleep and sex only (not work, not scrolling)

TIMING:
□ Consistent bedtime (same time ±30 min, even weekends)
□ Consistent wake time (same time ±30 min, even weekends)
□ 7-9 hours of sleep opportunity (not just time in bed)
□ No naps after 3 PM (disrupts nighttime sleep)

PRE-SLEEP ROUTINE (60 min before bed):
□ No screens (or use blue light filter)
□ No caffeine after 2 PM
□ No alcohol within 3 hours of bed (disrupts sleep quality)
□ No heavy exercise within 3 hours of bed
□ Relaxation activity (reading, stretching, breathing exercises)

DEVELOPER-SPECIFIC:
□ No coding in bed (your brain associates bed with work)
□ No Slack/email in bed (triggers anxiety)
□ No screen-time tracking in bed (creates performance anxiety)
□ Use 4-7-8 breathing if you can't fall asleep
code.explanation: Most developers violate sleep hygiene without realizing it. The biggest culprits: inconsistent schedule, screens in bed, and caffeine too late. Fixing these three alone can improve sleep significantly.

sections.heading: Exercise and Sleep
sections.body: Regular exercise improves sleep quality by 65%, but timing matters. Morning exercise is best for sleep (regulates circadian rhythm). Afternoon exercise is fine (improves deep sleep). Evening exercise (within 3 hours of bed) can interfere with falling asleep. The best exercise for developers: 30 minutes of moderate activity (walking, cycling, swimming) at least 4 days per week.

jargon.definition: Behaviors and environment that promote consistent, restful sleep. Includes timing, environment, and pre-sleep routines.
Your body's internal 24-hour clock, regulated by light exposure. Consistent sleep/wake times strengthen it.
Light from screens that suppresses melatonin production. Avoid screens 1 hour before bed, or use blue light filters.
Accumulated sleep deficit from insufficient sleep. Can be partially repaid by sleeping longer on weekends, but chronic debt harms health.

summary: Sleep is a productivity tool — 30% cognitive impairment after one bad night. Use sleep hygiene: consistent schedule, cool dark room, no screens before bed, no caffeine after 2 PM. Morning exercise improves sleep quality by 65%. Developers who sleep well write better code and learn faster.
